prompt: Single matte plastic electric toothbrush standing upright on a clean ceramic-tiled bathroom shelf, soft directional daylight from a frosted window, muted palette dominated by cool blue-grey (#7a9ab8) and matte neutrals, single deep restrained green (#3a9e62) accent in background. Negative space dominates the left two-thirds of the frame. UK domestic context. No people, no text, no brand marks, no plants, no clutter. Editorial, honest, photorealistic, 35mm prime. --ar 21:9 --style raw --v 7
notes: Append --oref <anchor-url> --ow 400 when running. Variants for other personal-care categories (hair dryer, hair straightener) reuse this template — swap the device noun only.
prompt_modifications: Live prompt diverged from locked v1 during the 2026-04-29 session. See resourcehip_website/brand/GENERATION_LOG.md for the actually-run prompt and the rationale per asset.

post_processing.edit: Removed potted plant from top-right (windowsill) to resolve §7 hard-constraint violation (no plants/leaves). Method: donor-strip stretch fill from clean column x=[1115,1320] across plant region x=[1320,1680], y=[0,340]; gaussian blur radius 1.4 + 18px feather at left/bottom seams. PIL/Pillow only — no AI inpainting. Toothbrush, palette, aspect ratio (1680x720) and small cup preserved.

Reopened by founder: v1 fill replicated a yellow/olive 'gold band' (Midjourney render artifact at y=270-290 — vague pseudo-handle) across the right side, and a faint pot-base seam was visible at y=320. v2 (a) cleans the gold band across the whole window-frame bottom x=[760,1680] y=[268,295] by interpolating from the windowsill-white reference rgb(176,191,180), skipping the toothbrush column x=[1015,1115]; (b) replaces the plant fill with per-row column average from the cleaned donor (no stretch, smoother result); (c) extends fill region to y=360 to fully eliminate pot base; (d) drops the bottom feather (was blending the pot back in) and uses donor-row average extension downward instead.
